name: Full Kane Suite (Manual)
description: Manually triggered full Kane verification of all Track B flows. Use before demo or after merging to confirm everything is green.

then.command: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test -- --run && kane-cli testmd .testmuai/tests/auth_test.md --agent --headless --timeout 60000 && kane-cli testmd .testmuai/tests/log_hangout_test.md --agent --headless --timeout 60000 && kane-cli testmd .testmuai/tests/leaderboard_test.md --agent --headless --timeout 60000 && kane-cli testmd .testmuai/tests/profile_badges_test.md --agent --headless --timeout 60000 && kane-cli testmd .testmuai/tests/streak_test.md --agent --headless --timeout 60000
